# Fixtures

This directory holds ASS/SSA fixtures used for regression and parity tests.

## Large/complex ASS files (kept)
- `test/fixtures/ass/aot3p2_op.ass`
- `test/fixtures/ass/benchmark.ass`
- `test/fixtures/ass/railgun_op.ass`

These three files entered the repository in its initial history without recorded upstream URLs or license metadata. Treat them as provenance-unknown test inputs: do not redistribute them in release artifacts, and replace them with traceable fixtures before using them outside this repository. `parity_smoke.ass` is a repository-authored minimal fixture.
